title: Far From Kyiv and Moscow, Soldiers Stalk Ruins and Evade Drones on the Front
summary_full: Ukraine’s military has denied a Kremlin claim to have taken a city in the eastern Donetsk region, saying its troops are holding out against infiltrating Russians.
summary_public: Ukraine’s military has denied a Kremlin claim to have taken a city in the eastern Donetsk region, saying its troops are holding out against infiltrating Russians.
